case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. EZEQUIEL MATUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MATUS, EZEQUIEL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-06-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-14-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17241015) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-28-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-06-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17305016)
